title: Some additional after-hours news items: more on Iran, plus a big AI model delay from Meta
description: A few more notable items out after the close.

title: Google Maps rolls out major AI upgrade with new search and navigation features
description: The company says the new capabilities draw on information from millions of reviews and websites, with results that include photos, ratings and other visual details.

title: NxtGen gears up for enterprise play with its Rs 3,600 crore sovereign AI factory
description: Teams up with Dell, Nvidia, CommScope and Vertiv to back enterprise inference

title: The Iran Conflict Briefly Sent Oil Past $115. Here's 1 Way It's Quietly Reshaping the AI Trade.
description: Data centers still rely heavily on fossil fuel power.

title: Silvaco outlines double-digit revenue growth for 2026 amid accelerated AI and IP momentum
description: Silvaco (SVCO) Q4 2025 earnings call recap: FTCO AI-driven TCAD traction, record IP/Mixel growth, margin gains, and 2026 outlook—read now.
